impact: This advances the PP&D plan by giving the daemon a small, redacted fixture set that exercises available evidence, missing fields, conflicting facts, stale documents, uncertain matches, and user-certification gates before any live crawl or authenticated DevHub automation.
summary: Added deterministic missing-information detector fixtures for comparing synthetic user document-store evidence against PP&D permit-process requirements.
target_task: Task checkbox-13: Add missing-information detector fixtures for user document-store comparison.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
